changes_made: Replaced verbose 431-line generic git reference with focused 120-line task-oriented skill
Added CRITICAL RULES section enforcing: one command at a time (no && chaining), no repeating failed commands, use git -C instead of cd, use write tool for JSON output
Restructured all commands to use git -C <repo> pattern to avoid directory confusion
Added explicit JSON report writing guidance using write tool instead of shell redirection
Removed cherry-pick -n flag warning (DO NOT use -n flag)
Kept only task-relevant sections: counting, authors, files, dates, merges, branching, cherry-pick, tags
Removed irrelevant sections: remote operations, rebasing, submodules, aliases, tips, workflows
